products.name: Groundnut Oil (Gold)
products.description: Our Gold grade: bright, light and clear, cold-pressed for clean everyday cooking.

products.name: Groundnut Oil (Premium)
products.description: Our Premium grade: denser, richer and deeper in colour, wood-pressed for fuller flavour.

products.name: Sunflower Oil
products.description: Light, clean and cold-pressed. A mild everyday oil that lets the flavour of your food come through.

products.name: Mustard Oil (Gold)
products.description: Our Gold grade: sharp and pungent with a clear golden colour, cold-pressed for daily cooking and tadka.

products.name: Mustard Oil (Premium)
products.description: Our Premium grade: denser and richer, wood-pressed for full strength and aroma.

products.name: Safflower Oil
products.description: Light and heart-friendly with a high smoke point. An easy cold-pressed swap for daily cooking and frying.

products.name: Coconut Oil
products.description: Cold-pressed from fresh coconuts, pure white with a clean natural scent. Equally at home in the kitchen or on skin and hair.

products.name: Virgin Coconut Oil
products.description: Single-pressed from fresh coconut, unrefined and never heated. The purest coconut oil for cooking, skin and hair.

products.name: Flaxseed Oil
products.description: Cold-pressed and rich in plant Omega 3. Best taken raw, drizzled over salads and dal or stirred into a smoothie.

products.name: Sesame Oil (Gold)
products.description: Our Gold grade: light, clear and nutty til oil, cold-pressed for everyday use and oil pulling.

products.name: Sesame Oil (Premium)
products.description: Our Premium grade: deep, dense and intensely nutty til oil, wood-pressed.

products.name: Black Sesame Oil (Premium)
products.description: Cold-pressed from black til. Deeper, earthier and prized in traditional cooking and winter foods.

products.name: Castor Oil
products.description: Cold-pressed, thick and pure. A trusted favourite for hair, scalp and skin care for generations.

products.name: Almond Oil
products.description: Cold-pressed from whole almonds with no heat or solvents. Light and nourishing for skin, hair and gentle massage.

products.name: A2 Gir Cow Ghee
products.description: Hand-churned the traditional bilona way from the A2 milk of desi Gir cows. Golden, grainy and deeply aromatic.

products.name: Honey
products.description: Wild, raw and unprocessed honey, never heated or filtered. Just pure honey, exactly as the bees made it.

products.name: Chemical-Free Jaggery
products.description: Traditional gul made without chemicals or sulphur. Earthy, rich and a wholesome swap for refined sugar.

products.name: Jaggery Powder
products.description: Chemical-free desi jaggery ground fine. Dissolves easily into tea, milk, sweets and baking.

products.name: Jaggery Cube
products.description: Handy bite-sized jaggery cubes, made without chemicals. A natural little sweet after meals.

products.name: High-Curcumin Turmeric
products.description: Single-source haldi with naturally high curcumin. Sun-dried and stone-ground, with no added colour.

products.name: Himalayan Rock Salt
products.description: Unrefined pink sendha namak from the Himalayas, naturally rich in minerals. Good for everyday use and fasting days.

products.name: Black Salt
products.description: Kala namak with its signature tangy, smoky-mineral taste. The finishing touch for chaats, raitas, salads and buttermilk.

products.name: Sugar-Free Aloe Vera Juice
products.description: Cold-pressed aloe vera with no added sugar. Light and soothing, an easy daily drink for skin and digestion.

products.name: Sugar-Free Amla Juice
products.description: Cold-pressed amla with no added sugar. One of nature's richest sources of Vitamin C, taken as a daily wellness shot.

products.name: Sugar-Free Jamun Juice
products.description: Cold-pressed jamun with no added sugar. A traditional drink long valued for blood sugar support.

products.name: Zankar Pain Relief Oil
products.description: A fast-acting herbal oil for tired joints and muscles. Massage in and let the warmth do its work.

products.name: Amla Prash
products.description: An amla-rich herbal preserve made to support everyday immunity. A spoonful a day for the whole family.

products.name: Gulkand Prash
products.description: A cooling rose-petal preserve blended with herbs. Naturally sweet, fragrant and soothing in the warmer months.

products.name: Cold-Pressed Kalonji Oil
products.description: Cold-pressed black seed (kalonji) oil. Long treasured across cultures for hair, scalp and wellness.

products.name: Neem Citronella Gomay Bar
products.description: A handmade gomay bar with neem and citronella. Naturally cleansing and refreshing, gentle enough for daily use.

products.name: Ubtan Gomay Bar
products.description: A handmade gomay bath bar with a traditional ubtan blend. Gently cleanses and leaves skin soft and glowing.

products.name: Bhimseni Kapoor Soap
products.description: A handmade soap with pure bhimseni camphor. Cooling and cleansing, with a fresh, calming aroma.

products.name: Deepam Oil
products.description: Pure, clean-burning lamp oil for your daily diya and puja. Lights easily and holds a steady, bright flame.

products.name: Bhimseni Kapoor
products.description: Pure natural bhimseni camphor with no synthetic fillers. For aarti, dhoop and a naturally fragrant home.

products.name: Clay Utensils
products.description: Handcrafted clay cookware and serving ware that brings food back to its earthy roots. Ask us for the current range.
